program: National AI Data Center Grid (NDRC draft plan)
notes: DRAFT plan led by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC); ~2 trillion yuan (~$295B) over ~5 yr, national computing grid targeted for 2028, investment window through 2031. Funding is a MIX of sovereign debt, state funds, bank loans, and private investment, so the genuinely-public outlay vs private-mobilized split is unspecified (both left null, not summed). Mandates >=80% domestic hardware/software (incl. AI chips). State telecoms China Mobile/China Telecom to operate. Builds on 2022 'Eastern Data, Western Computing'. Not yet adopted -> low confidence. Reported by Bloomberg (2026-06-09); confirmed details via Crypto Briefing 2026-06-12.

program: National Quantum Initiative Reauthorization Act (S.3597 / H.R.6213) — authorization
notes: AUTHORIZATION bill (reintroduced ~2026-01-08) would authorize ~$2.7B FY2025-FY2029 across NIST/NSF/NASA/DOE, extending NQI to 2034. Authorization only — not appropriated, not yet enacted as of 2026-06; public_outlay null. HOLD for human review.

Up to £2B by 2030 (Spending Review Jun 2025, roadmap 2025-07-17); expands AIRR (£1B) + £750M Edinburgh supercomputer. LIKELY OVERLAPS the £1B AIRR under uk-ai-action-plan AND the £750M supercomputer under uk-ai-hardware-plan-2026. HOLD — reviewer should reconcile before promoting to avoid double-count.

Up to 260,000 NVIDIA GPUs to Korean govt + Samsung/SK/Hyundai/NAVER (APEC Gyeongju, 2025-10-31). Value est. $7.8-10.5B by 2030. Mostly corporate procurement; govt portion ~50,000 GPUs for a National AI Computing Center. HOLD — analyst-estimated multi-party value, low confidence.

ISM 2.0 launched in Union Budget 2026-27; ₹1,000 crore initial FY allocation, with reports of ~₹1.2 lakh crore (~$14B) total cleared outlay. Total figure reported but not fully confirmed in primary PIB text — HOLD. Distinct from ISM 1.0 (2021) and IndiaAI Mission.

Israel's ~NIS 1.2B five-year National Quantum Program (incl. ~NIS 100M IQCC), reported nearing renewal late 2025. Distinct from il-national-ai (AI program). Exact appropriation/dates fuzzy across sources — HOLD, unconfirmed/low. usd_approx at ~0.275 ILS/USD.

RM10B (~$2.36B) YTL Power + NVIDIA AI infrastructure (600MW Johor data center, Malaysia's first sovereign LLM). Predominantly private YTL capital — in private_mobilized; govt role is policy backing. HOLD — low confidence. usd_approx at ~4.4 MYR/USD.

program: Board of Investment hyperscale data-centre approvals
notes: Thailand BOI approved hyperscale data-centre projects worth ~THB100B (~$3.1B), part of a larger 2025 BOI data-center wave tied to a sovereign-AI / local-LLM push. Govt role = BOI approval/incentives; capital is private — in private_mobilized. HOLD — vague date, low confidence. usd_approx at ~33 THB/USD.

Draft decree (Apr 2026) for a National AI Development Fund with state budget >= VND30,000B (~$1.14B), non-profit state financial entity. Still draft/pending issuance — HOLD, unconfirmed/low. usd_approx at ~0.000038 VND/USD.
